title: Compilation error on extern function that returns parametrized class

features.name: extern static function returning parameterized class
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with an extern static function declaration that returns the parameterized class type

features.name: function definition returning parametric class using type parameter
features.description: Code should include a function definition that returns a parametric class type, where the return type uses the class's type parameter

features.name: calling parameterized class constructor via type parameter
features.description: Code should include calling a static function of a parameterized class using explicit type parameter syntax
